title: Perinatal Hepatitis B Coordinator List | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
Nov. 15, 2024 
What to know 
Perinatal Hepatitis B Coordinators list is organized by state. 
This page provides contact information for health care providers seeking assistance with management of Hepatitis B Surface Antigen (HBsAg) positive pregnant women and Hepatitis B virus-exposed newborns. 
Additional information 
Revisions to this list should be sent to Tonia Benfield: af80@cdc.gov 
Note: Click on the coordinator's name to send an email. 
Note: "C" indicates a fax number that can accept confidential documents.
